raw: This is a printable pass. You will receive the pass in your email or library staff can print it for you after you have made a reservation. Each pass allows admission for 2 adults at $15 each (applicable to general admission and special exhibition tickets) and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (applicable to special exhibition only, children's general admission tickets are already $10 and do not receive a discount from the Museum Pass). Children 6 and under are admitted free. BRING THIS PASS TO THE ADMISSIONS DESK at the museum to have the discount applied.
